raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Match fitness load","name":"How is your body holding up after matches and training lately?","description":"Surfaces whether the physical load is sustainable or accumulating quietly.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Recovery pattern","name":"What does your recovery look like between sessions?","description":"Gets concrete about sleep, soreness, and whether he is actually resetting.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Outside football","name":"What else is taking up the most energy outside football right now?","description":"Finds external demands that may be affecting capacity or focus.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team chemistry","name":"Where are your connections with teammates feeling strongest right now?","description":"Explores relationship quality and whether he feels integrated in the group.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Training lift","name":"What part of your game are you most trying to sharpen at the moment?","description":"Surfaces current personal motivation and where he is choosing to invest effort.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Season target","name":"What would make this season feel like a step forward for you?","description":"Clarifies the outcome he is aiming for and what success means to him.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recent win","name":"What has been landing well in your game recently?","description":"Opens a concrete discussion of strengths without forcing self-praise.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Feedback use","name":"How are you using the feedback you have been getting lately?","description":"Checks whether coaching input is being translated into action.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision moments","name":"Where do you want more freedom to make decisions on the pitch?","description":"Surfaces autonomy, judgment, and whether he wants a bigger role in playmaking.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Role edges","name":"What part of your role feels least settled right now?","description":"Finds ambiguity in responsibilities or expectations that may need tightening.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stretch next","name":"What is the next level of performance you want to be known for?","description":"Gets at ambition and the specific stretch he is aiming toward.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recognition fit","name":"What kind of recognition actually lands for you?","description":"Learns what acknowledgment feels meaningful rather than generic.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]}]}
